basic_details.job_title: CSMCARI Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Yoga Therapist and Junior Research Fellow Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Captain Srinivasamurthy Central Ayurveda Research Institute

age_limit.age_details: Not more than 28 years for JRF
age_limit.details: JRF: Not more than 28 years (Age relaxation as per GOI rules). Yoga Therapist: Age limit not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy, M.Sc. Biotechnology/Microbiology
qualification.details: Yoga Therapist: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with a minimum of 55% marks from a recognized University and two years' experience in Yoga Therapy in a reputed Institute/ Hospital OR Any Graduate from a recognized University established under UGC Act with diploma in Yoga after graduation of at least one-year duration from a recognized University/ Institute with 55% marks and practical experience in Yoga in a reputed Yoga Institute/ Hospital for a minimum period of five years. Level II (Therapy level) Certificate of YCB. Demonstration skills in Yogic practices, for which skill test will be conducted. JRF: M.Sc. Biotechnology/ Microbiology from a recognized University/ Institution.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 38000/- per month Consolidated (Yoga Therapist), Rs. 37000/- per month + HRA as Admissible (JRF)
salary_details.details: Yoga Therapist: Rs. 38000/- per month Consolidated JRF: Rs. 37000/- per month + HRA as Admissible.

selection_process: Written test Interview Skill test (for Yoga Therapist)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Yoga Therapist?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Yoga Therapist position is scheduled for 09 July 2026. Candidates should report to the venue on this date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: For the JRF post, candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Biotechnology or Microbiology from a recognized University or Institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Yoga Therapist position?
faq.answer: The consolidated emoluments for the Yoga Therapist position are Rs. 38,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age limit for the Yoga Therapist post?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify an age limit for the Yoga Therapist post. However, for the JRF post, the maximum age is 28 years.

faq.question: Q5. What are the documents required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates need to carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a written test, an interview, and a skill test specifically for the Yoga Therapist position.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the Captain Srinivasamurthy Central Ayurveda Research Institute located?
faq.answer: The institute is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600106.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 02/2026.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any application fees for these positions?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any of the posts.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies: 2 for Yoga Therapist and 1 for JRF.
